Class FactoryEntityDecorator

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.omo.smartfactory.patterns.observer.FactoryEntity
cz.cvut.fel.omo.smartfactory.patterns.decorator.FactoryEntityDecorator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Subject
Direct Known Subclasses:
LoggingDecorator
public abstract class FactoryEntityDecorator extends FactoryEntity
Abstract decorator class for FactoryEntity.
